description_long: This house is a two-story rectangular structure with a flat roof, surrounded by a dense row of tall trees that form a partial enclosure around the property. The exterior walls are a light gray color, and the windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on both floors. The front of the house features a paved driveway leading to a parking area with several cars, and a small green lawn is visible on the roof and at the rear. The backyard includes a circular water feature and additional green space, all bordered by the same tall trees. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential lot with a focus on privacy and greenery.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by tall trees and featuring a driveway with parked cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked cars, main entrance, and the tree-lined perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the green backyard, and the circular water feature.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the tall trees, with the back of the house mostly obscured and the roof garden visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway extension, side windows, and the arrangement of trees and backyard features.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved steps, and no porch, flanked by windows and accessed via a straight driveway.
